table.style: border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid;

list.li: Before starting this work, confirm that the machine power is turned ON and that all machine operations are stopped.
This procedure requires the operator to enter inside the machine, and so careful attention is needed during the work.

Be sure to place a warning tag on each operation panel, main power switch, and other locations when performing work to ensure that other personnel do not turn ON the power inadvertently which could result in the machine being operated.
When operating the machine, maintain clear communication with everyone in the area to ensure operator safety.

table.style: border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid;

list.li: If you attempt to move a feed axis without removing the fixing bracket, the machine could be damaged.

body.para: The fixing brackets are required when relocating the machine. After removing them, store them for future use.

para.style: margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:26px;

list.style: margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:20px; font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:20px; font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: Remove the washer [4] and socket head cap screw [5] and remove the fixing bracket [3] (yellow painted part).

para.style: text-align:center; margin-bottom:5px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:-1px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:1px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:center; text-indent:-1px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:1px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:26px; page-break-before:always;

list.style: margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:20px; font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:20px; font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: Remove the washers [5] and socket head screws [6] to remove the fixing bracket [3] [4].

para.style: text-align:center; margin-bottom:8px;
text-align:center; margin-bottom:8px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:26px; page-break-before:always;

list.li: Remove the washer [4] and socket head cap screw [5] mounted to the fixing bracket [3] (yellow painted part).

para.style: text-align:center; margin-bottom:8px;
text-align:center; margin-bottom:8px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;
